{{Quote|When we pursue shadows, we are destined to find darkness.|Otias to [[Adalric Cessius Brandl]]|<ref name="The Final Exit">{{JournalCite|4|The Final Exit}}</ref>}}
'''Otias Atori''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a stage coach of [[Adalric Cessius Brandl]] and surrogate father of [[Jaalib Brandl]] during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] rise by [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. When Adalric returned to [[Trulalis]] seeking redemption in [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]], he came to Otias who then informed him he was beyond redemption.

{{Char-stub}}
